tasks.title: Implement research input validation
tasks.description: Validate presence and schema of required research artifacts from /Users/sweeden/research_paper before generation starts.

tasks.title: Generate candidate collection markdown pages
tasks.description: Create/update _candidates/<candidate_slug>.md with complete front matter and rendered sections for each candidate.

tasks.title: Generate candidate data JSON files
tasks.description: Write _data/candidates/<city>/<office>/<candidate_slug>.json from research artifacts for data-driven templates.

tasks.title: Create candidate media directories
tasks.description: Ensure assets/img/candidates/<candidate_slug>/ exists and include metadata placeholder per candidate.

tasks.title: Update selenium candidate ui case inventory
tasks.description: Generate tests/selenium/candidate_ui_cases.json using latest candidate pages and required assertion text.

tasks.title: Maintain selenium candidate page test hook
tasks.description: Create/update tests/selenium/test_candidate_pages.py to assert candidate visibility and required page fields.

tasks.title: Create github actions workflow for candidate sync
tasks.description: Add .github/workflows/candidate-pages-sync.yml to run generation, Jekyll build, and UI verification.

tasks.title: Emit sync run summary artifact
tasks.description: Write a run summary file with candidate count, files written, and verification status for CI visibility.
